referenceVisualNotes.heroLayout: Split hero with content block on the left and a full-height smiling patient/team image on the right; light tinted hero background and compact CTA cluster.
referenceVisualNotes.heroTypography: Large modern sans headline with medium-weight supporting paragraph and generous top/bottom whitespace.
referenceVisualNotes.statsBar: Four evenly spaced trust metrics in a horizontal white strip directly under hero.
referenceVisualNotes.servicesSection: Vertical service list on the left with one active item shown in a larger detail panel on the right including image and summary.
referenceVisualNotes.featureSection: Centered support section with 2x2 icon cards on a mostly white background and restrained tint accents.
referenceVisualNotes.testimonials: Image-led testimonial row with supporting quote cards and visible star rating treatment.
referenceVisualNotes.sectionRhythm: Tinted hero -> white stats strip -> white trust cards -> subtle lavender/teal services panel -> white testimonial section -> dark footer.
referenceVisualNotes.whitespace: Airy spacing with clear separation between section groups and minimal visual clutter.
referenceVisualNotes.buttonStyle: Rounded pill buttons with one solid primary action and one outlined secondary action.
referenceVisualNotes.colorApplication: Primary teal anchors headings and CTAs, accent green appears in highlights/icons, and the rest of the page stays white with very soft tinted backgrounds.

sections.heading: Modern restorative care with personal attention at every visit.
